title: Zoro Cuts Through the War
description: Robin follows the historical trail through Upper Yard while the war around her threatens to bury the island’s forgotten truth.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, 19, 20, this scene centers on Narrator, Luffy, Enel, Zoro, Wyper. Robin follows the historical trail through Upper Yard while the war around her threatens to bury the island’s forgotten truth.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Two hours have passed since the start...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Of the survivor game of Upper Yard.
